content.claim: As of June 2026, Education Minister Judit Lannert publicly questioned the track admissions system on equity grounds, but framed the proposal narrowly as examination of the admissions process rather than abolition, triggering immediate partisan political conflict with accusations of sweeping system transformation
content.context: Fresh live research through the Implementation planning lens
limitations: No formal implementation plan or timeline has been published; debate remains at agenda-setting stage
Scope and intent of reform proposal subject to immediate reinterpretation and contestation within 24-48 hours
Long-term political sustainability of the reform agenda unresolved
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
